# PERF-153 negative: cookie fields are extracted once
lang: go
file: PERF-153-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	for _, cookie := range r.Cookies() {
		if cookie.Name == "session" {
			val := cookie.Value
			_ = val
		}
	}
}
